title: Token Budget and Memory Relevance Improvements
description: Reduce token waste in Moe agent startup/context by making memory compact/opt-in, keeping claim responses lean, and limiting auto-memory to high-value learnings.
architectureNotes: Focus on daemon MCP tool response shaping and memory auto-extraction defaults. Preserve Moe source-of-truth rules; do not edit .moe directly.
epicRails: Keep claim_next_task fast and free of memory payloads.
Default memory surfacing should be compact/low-token; full memory content remains available through moe.recall.
Only auto-save high-signal memories by default: QA rejections, reopened-task approvals, and explicit moe.remember.
